# Apple Fritter American Eatery

> Locally owned American eatery in San Mateo, CA serving breakfast and lunch since 2014. Known for donut burgers, golden apple fritters, loaded fries, and fruity pebble shakes.

## Location
- Address: 1901 S. Norfolk Street, San Mateo, CA 94403
- Phone: (650) 525-9125
- Email: applefrittereatery@gmail.com

## Hours
- Monday through Friday: 7:30 AM to 2:00 PM
- Saturday and Sunday: 8:00 AM to 2:00 PM

## Signature Items
- Donut Burger: Beef patty with melted cheese on a glazed donut bun
- Apple Fritters: Golden fried with real apple chunks and cinnamon sugar (sell out fast on weekends)
- Fruity Pebble Shake: Thick milkshake blended with Fruity Pebbles cereal
- Churro French Toast: French toast coated in cinnamon sugar with chocolate drizzle
- Fritter Fries: Loaded fries with pulled pork, cheese, green onions, BBQ sauce
- Godzilla Fries: Fries with chorizo, nacho cheese, jalapenos

## Menu Categories
- Burgers (donut burger, Hawaiian, Gilroy, classic, specialty)
- Breakfast plates (scrambles, pancakes, french toast, burritos)
- Loaded fries (fritter fries, Godzilla fries, bacon cheese, sweet potato)
- Donuts and sweets (apple fritters, blueberry pie donut, crepes, churros)
- Drinks (milkshakes, boba, iced milk teas, coffee)

## Ordering
- DoorDash: https://www.doordash.com/store/apple-fritter-san-mateo-336498/
- EZCater (catering): https://www.ezcater.com/catering/apple-fritter-3
- Uber Eats available
- Walk-ins always welcome

## About
Apple Fritter opened in December 2014 as a locally owned and operated cafe. The interior features a satirical past/present/future theme designed by the owners, with taco-shaped windows and classics playing on the TV. The vibe is playful, warm, and community-focused.
